# Security Policy

## Scope

This repository contains educational content and a reference application for a blog series. It is not a production service. Security issues in the reference code (`/app`) are still worth reporting so readers are not misled by insecure examples.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Report them privately by email: **kontakt@dczerwinski.pl**

Include:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce or a proof of concept
- The affected file(s) or component

You can expect an acknowledgement within 7 days. Since this is a personal project there is no bug bounty program.
